this activity diagram models the flow of a pathfinder page interaction.
the user starts by opening the pathfinder page.
they have the option to go back ("indietro"), which leads to returning to the homepage.
if they do not click "indietro," they proceed to view a question.
after viewing the question, they select a response, which may lead to displaying a suggested location if one is available.
if no suggestion is available, the process ends without further steps.
the diagram captures the main flow and a potential error path (no suggestion available).
